# kIOHIDElementMaxKey

**Macro**

Keys that represent properties of a particular elements.

## Declaration

```swift
#define kIOHIDElementMaxKey
```

## Discussion

These keys can also be added to a matching dictionary when searching for elements via copyMatchingElements.
